title: 15 violet passage becomes ivy
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks the confectionary tunnel depth, stained-glass jelly light, and circular destination composition, but change its material from green apple to deep grape violet. Image 2 exactly locks the single familiar. Image 3 locks only the sunny ivy-covered campus visible beyond the exit. BEAT — Camera travels inside a wholly confectionary violet grape-gummy passage. The familiar glides ahead toward daylight, its thin peeled cape trailing as one violet tendril along the tunnel wall. Only as that tendril reaches the bright opening does it gradually turn green and become real ivy climbing the campus building outside. The morph is continuous and visible in one frame. AVOID — teeth, tongue, throat, flesh, cave rock, underwater ocean, abrupt separate grapevine, extra creatures, night campus, generic purple vortex.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, or storyboard grid. Treat each attached image only according to its declared authority. Preserve Raul and Meg as the same teenagers, and preserve the established top-of-bleachers world, dusk light, clothing, and geography. Attached ingredient sheets are exact character or object design authorities; reproduce them faithfully rather than redesigning them from prose. Keep the surreal event localized and legible inside the live-action stadium. Candy remains tactile, translucent, appetizing, and benign. No anatomy, gore, generic gummy bears, captions, borders, watermarks, or invented package copy.
